title: A Hogsmeade Weekend, Fifth Year
prose: Between O.W.L. revision timetables, a Hogsmeade weekend feels less like an outing and more like a small, necessary act of self-preservation. The Three Broomsticks is as loud and warm as ever, though half the tables around you are covered in open textbooks rather than butterbeer.
You allow yourself exactly one afternoon of not thinking about exams before the guilt sets back in.

choices.label: Properly switch off for the afternoon.
Bring your revision notes along anyway.
